case_title: JANG, EDWINA VS ZHU, ZHE CHANG et al

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO JOHN KELLY RETURNED SIGNED.
CERT. MAIL TO ZHE CHANG ZHU AND FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP. PAID $5.00 EACH.
CERT. RECEIPT TO ZHE CHANG ZHU RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JANG, EDWINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHU, ZHE CHANG $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,225.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY JANG, EDWINA AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU, ZHE CHANG FARMERS INSURANCE GROUP C/O KELLY JOHNSON, CLAIMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
